name: Champion, Artemis of harmony
desc:
You can discard this card (Quick Effect); Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster
from your Extra Deck by shuffling monsters from your GY and/or that are banished
into the Deck as Fusion Materials, then draw cards equal to the number of
materials shuffled.

A monster Fusion Summoned by this effect cannot declare an attack during the
turn it is Summoned, and if it is Fusion Summoned by this effect: you take
damage equal to that monster’s ATK.

During your opponent’s End Phase: return "Champion, Artemis of Harmony"
to the hand.

You can only use this effect of "Champion, Artemis of Harmony" once per turn.
